title: BlackBerry Limited Common Stock Earnings Report Dates & Earnings Forecasts
text: BlackBerry Limited is expected to announce its next earnings report on 06/23/2026, with analysts projecting an EPS of -$0.04. The company reported Q4 2026 earnings on April 9, 2026, posting earnings per share of $0.06, exceeding analysts' expectations of $0.04 by 50%. Q4 2026 revenue reached $156.0 million, up 10% year-over-year, and full-year revenue was $549.1 million, up 3% year-over-year. The company achieved GAAP net income of $24.3 million for the quarter and $53.2 million for the year, marking the eighth consecutive quarter of improving profitability. The QNX division achieved an all-time high quarterly revenue of $68.7 million, representing 10% year-over-year growth. Management maintained full-year revenue and EBITDA guidance ranges and raised full-year secure communications revenue guidance. FY27 revenue guidance is $584-611 million with adjusted EBITDA of $110-130 million.
